brand_name.title: Brand / Franchise Name
brand_name.description: The brand or franchise name (e.g., RE/MAX Turkey, Coldwell Banker)

agent_count.title: Number of Active Agents
agent_count.description: Number of agents actively using the platform

lead_sources.title: Lead Sources
lead_sources.description: Primary lead sources used (e.g., portal crawling, referrals, walk-ins)

commission_structure.title: Commission Structure
commission_structure.description: How commissions are structured (e.g., split, tiered, flat)

target_response_time_minutes.title: Target Response Time (minutes)
target_response_time_minutes.description: Target time to first contact with a new lead

target_conversion_rate.title: Target Lead-to-Contract Rate (%)
target_conversion_rate.description: Target conversion rate from lead to signed contract

avg_transaction_value.title: Average Transaction Value
avg_transaction_value.description: Average transaction price in local currency
